raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support, specifically the need for softening or support for two substantive claims.",
    "R1.6": "The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation, specifically the uncertainty about the Wang et al. (2021) citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, specifically the need for confidence intervals or seed counts.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as the lack of robustness analysis.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support, specifically the need for softening or support for two substantive claims.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation, specifically the uncertainty about the Wang et al. (2021) citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, specifically the need for confidence intervals or seed counts.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as the lack of robustness analysis.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
